task: Find the weight of baggage allowance for economy class on Qatar Airways.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully found the baggage allowance information on the official Qatar Airways baggage allowance page and reported the Economy Class weights shown there. The trajectory includes direct evidence from https://www.qatarairways.com/en/baggage/allowance.html showing the Economy table: carry-on 1 piece up to 7 kg (Brazil exception 10 kg), checked baggage to/from Africa or the Americas as 1 piece up to 23 kg for Lite and 2 pieces up to 23 kg each for Classic/Convenience/Comfort, and checked baggage for all other destinations as 20/25/30/35 kg by fare type. This satisfies the task of finding the baggage allowance weight for economy class on Qatar Airways.
final_result_response:
On Qatar Airways Economy Class, the baggage allowance depends on fare type and route:

- Carry-on: 1 piece up to 7 kg (15 lb), or 10 kg (22 lb) on flights to/from Brazil.
- Checked baggage to/from Africa or the Americas:
  - Economy Lite: 1 piece up to 23 kg (50 lb)
  - Economy Classic, Convenience, Comfort: 2 pieces up to 23 kg (50 lb) each
- Checked baggage to all other destinations:
  - Lite: 20 kg
  - Classic: 25 kg
  - Convenience: 30 kg
  - Comfort: 35 kg

<citation refs="search_f90e30baf8434940a6a3d37b4ad6ed28#1">Qatar Airways lists Economy carry-on as “1 piece up to 7kg (15lb)” and checked baggage as “1 piece up to 23kg” or “2 pieces up to 23kg each” for Africa/Americas, and “20kg, 25kg, 30kg, 35kg” for other destinations.</citation>
action_history: Opening Qatar Airways site: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.qatarairways.com/');
